title: Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model

defines.name: Direct Preference Optimization
defines.definition: A reinforcement-learning-free method for training language models from human preferences by directly optimizing a policy with a binary classification objective.

problem: RLHF is complex, unstable, and computationally expensive because it requires fitting a reward model and then performing reinforcement learning to optimize the language model policy.
